living: The heart of the house — featuring a wood-burning stove as a gathering centerpiece, lazy couches, and grandmother's refurbished armchair. Excellent for rainy afternoons and card games.
kitchen: Fully equipped for cooking in — induction stove, oven, dishwasher, double fridge, double freezer, and a fully stocked pantry. A bench looking out over the lake lets guests linger over a cocktail while the host cooks.
dining: Built around a massive 3-metre dining table seating 12, equally suited to a long brunch, board games, or a bit of creative work. The room's characteristic blue glass windows look out over the water, with a door straight onto the terrace.
bedrooms: A master bedroom upstairs, with a cot available on request. Downstairs, two further bedrooms — one with a double bed, one with a bunk bed. Linen included.
outdoors: A [m²] wooden terrace with a jacuzzi overlooking the lake, plus a firepit, grill, and sunbeds. The sauna sits by the lake, just a short walk from the house. At the front, an extra patio catches the morning sun — perfect for breakfast, with a sandbox and trampoline for the kids.
guesthouse: Separate but close to the main house, with its own bathroom and two bedrooms — one with a double bed, one with a single bed.
